title: cornus longifolia
intro: Cornus longifolia, also known as the flowering dogwood, is a deciduous shrub native to China and Korea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cornus longifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
